# {{ site.title }}

> {{ site.description }}

This is the personal site of {{ site.author.name }}: a blog plus a small set of
hands-on technical reference guides and browser tools. Content spans passion
projects, electronics, software experiments, and curiosity-driven write-ups.

## Main sections

- [Blog]({{ '/blog/' | absolute_url }}): Articles, experiments, and write-ups.
- [Projects]({{ '/projects/' | absolute_url }}): Posts about things I've built.
- [References]({{ '/references/' | absolute_url }}): Index of the reference guides below.
- [About]({{ '/about/' | absolute_url }}): Who I am and what this site is.
- [Contact]({{ '/contact/' | absolute_url }}): How to get in touch.

## Reference guides

- [EM Spectrum]({{ '/references/spectrum/' | absolute_url }}): Searchable, sortable reference of the electromagnetic spectrum bands.
- [Electronics Fundamentals]({{ '/references/electronics-fundamentals/' | absolute_url }}): Interactive primer on core electronics concepts.
- [CLI Command Cheat Sheet]({{ '/references/cmd-cheat-sheet/' | absolute_url }}): Searchable command reference with interactive tools (chmod, find, regex, curl).

## Recent posts
{% assign count = 0 %}
{% for post in site.posts %}{% if post.status == "published" or post.status == "placeholder" %}{% if count < 20 %}
- [{{ post.title | strip_html }}]({{ post.url | absolute_url }}){% if post.description %}: {{ post.description | strip_html | truncate: 140 }}{% endif %}
{% assign count = count | plus: 1 %}{% endif %}{% endif %}{% endfor %}

## Optional

- [Atom feed]({{ '/feed.xml' | absolute_url }}): Full post feed.
- [Sitemap]({{ '/sitemap.xml' | absolute_url }}): All indexable URLs.

</invoke>
